meaning: adj.乐于助人的,随和的,善于适应新环境的
examples: Eddie was among the most approachable athletes on the team, always very accommodating to me.
A child's facility in accommodating itself to circumstances was never more strikingly illustrated.
You have all these conferences and projects about making public accounting more accommodating to women.
Score said accommodating the new tablets would be relatively easy thanks to a revamped store design.
